'''âz-h-r''' ('''kazahar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:caffeinate|caffeinate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-h-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:caffeinate|caffeinate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-h-r
|-
! Lemma
| kazahar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizahar|thizahar]] || [[word:jizahar|jizahar]] || [[word:shizahar|shizahar]] || [[word:kizahar|kizahar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzahar|thuthuzahar]] || [[word:jujuzahar|jujuzahar]] || [[word:shushuzahar|shushuzahar]] || [[word:kukuzahar|kukuzahar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzahar|thuzahar]] || [[word:juzahar|juzahar]] || [[word:shuzahar|shuzahar]] || [[word:kuzahar|kuzahar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzahar|thuzahar]] || [[word:juzahar|juzahar]] || [[word:shuzahar|shuzahar]] || [[word:kuzahar|kuzahar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezahar|thezahar]] || [[word:jezahar|jezahar]] || [[word:shezahar|shezahar]] || [[word:kezahar|kezahar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozahar|thothozahar]] || [[word:jojozahar|jojozahar]] || [[word:shoshozahar|shoshozahar]] || [[word:kokozahar|kokozahar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozahar|thozahar]] || [[word:jozahar|jozahar]] || [[word:shozahar|shozahar]] || [[word:kozahar|kozahar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozahar|thozahar]] || [[word:jozahar|jozahar]] || [[word:shozahar|shozahar]] || [[word:kozahar|kozahar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzahar|thĂŠzahar]] || [[word:jĂŠzahar|jĂŠzahar]] || [[word:shĂŠzahar|shĂŠzahar]] || [[word:kĂŠzahar|kĂŠzahar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazahar|thathazahar]] || [[word:jajazahar|jajazahar]] || [[word:shashazahar|shashazahar]] || [[word:kakazahar|kakazahar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazahar|thazahar]] || [[word:jazahar|jazahar]] || [[word:shazahar|shazahar]] || [[word:kazahar|kazahar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazahar|thazahar]] || [[word:jazahar|jazahar]] || [[word:shazahar|shazahar]] || [[word:kazahar|kazahar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazahar|shazahar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazahar|goshazahar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazahar|gokishazahar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazaharnĂŒ|shazaharnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazaharnknĂŒ|goshazaharnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazaharnĂŒ|gokishazaharnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazaharshĂ«|shazaharshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazaharnkshĂ«|goshazaharnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazaharshĂ«|gokishazaharshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazaharo|shazaharo]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazaharnkro|goshazaharnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazaharo|gokishazaharo]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazaharmu|shazaharmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazaharnkmu|goshazaharnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazaharmu|gokishazaharmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazaharsher|shazaharsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazaharnksher|goshazaharnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazaharsher|gokishazaharsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazaharng|shazaharng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazaharnkng|goshazaharnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazaharng|gokishazaharng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazaharya|shazaharya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazaharnkya|goshazaharnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazaharya|gokishazaharya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazaharyam|shazaharyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazaharnkyam|goshazaharnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazaharyam|gokishazaharyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazaharnĂŒshĂ«|shazaharnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazaharnknĂŒshĂ«|goshazaharnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazaharnĂŒshĂ«|gokishazaharnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazaharnĂŒro|shazaharnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazaharnknĂŒro|goshazaharnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazaharnĂŒro|gokishazaharnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazaharnĂŒmu|shazaharnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazaharnknĂŒmu|goshazaharnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazaharnĂŒmu|gokishazaharnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazaharshĂ«nĂŒ|shazaharshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazaharnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazaharnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazaharshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazaharshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazaharshĂ«ro|shazaharshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazaharnkshĂ«ro|goshazaharnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazaharshĂ«ro|gokishazaharshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazaharshĂ«mu|shazaharshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazaharnkshĂ«mu|goshazaharnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazaharshĂ«mu|gokishazaharshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazaharonĂŒ|shazaharonĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazaharnkronĂŒ|goshazaharnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazaharonĂŒ|gokishazaharonĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazaharoshĂ«|shazaharoshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazaharnkroshĂ«|goshazaharnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazaharoshĂ«|gokishazaharoshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazaharomu|shazaharomu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazaharnkromu|goshazaharnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazaharomu|gokishazaharomu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazaharmunĂŒ|shazaharmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazaharnkmunĂŒ|goshazaharnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazaharmunĂŒ|gokishazaharmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazaharmushĂ«|shazaharmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazaharnkmushĂ«|goshazaharnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazaharmushĂ«|gokishazaharmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazaharmuro|shazaharmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazaharnkmuro|goshazaharnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazaharmuro|gokishazaharmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
